title: Goat's Tool Trims
description: My attempt at making trimmable Tools.
body:
## Put the Datapack in your Datapacks and Resourcepacks folders for it to work!
This Datapack adds Trims for Tools in a Vanilla way.

GTT is for those People who want Tool Trims without any other Features.

## A Preview of the Trims
![Showcase of all the Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10949ffe2f780f817e3606fb063f70499912b904.png)

## Features
- Sword Trims
- Axe Trims
- Pickaxe Trims
- Shovel Trims
- Hoe Trims
- Spear Trims

## Planned Features
- Bow Trims
- Crossbow Trims
- Mobs using trimmed tools in trial chamber encounters
- Advancements

## Modpacks
Yes, you can use it in a Modpack
